data.title: Binance Alpha to Launch LayerEdge (EDGEN)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Alpha will become the first platform to launch LayerEdge (EDGEN), and the trading opening date is June 2, and the specific time will be announced later.
In addition, eligible users need to use Alpha points to claim the airdrop on the Alpha event page. The event page and details will be launched on June 2.

data.title: Glassnode: BlackRock and Fidelity Ethereum ETF investors have an average loss of 21%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Glassnode stated in a report that investors in BlackRock and Fidelity's spot Ethereum ETFs are currently facing significant losses, with an average unrealized loss of about 21%. Data shows that the cost basis of BlackRock's spot Ethereum ETF is $3,300, while Fidelity's is higher at $3,500. ETH is currently trading at around $2,601.
Meanwhile, Glassnode said these ETFs have little impact on Ethereum’s spot price. “The Ethereum ETF initially accounted for only about 1.5% of spot market volume, indicating that the market response to the ETF launch was relatively muted.”

data.title: LABUBU's market value briefly exceeded US$57 million, with a 24-hour increase of more than 81%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to GMGN market data, LABUBU's market value briefly exceeded 57 million US dollars, with a 24-hour increase of more than 81%, and now has a market value of 53.72 million US dollars.

data.title: Backpack issues airdrops to platinum users
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Backpack announced on the X platform that it has issued airdrops to users in the platinum rank of the first season. In addition, Backpack said that the empowerment of points is still in the early stages, and there will be more incentives and usage scenarios in the future.
Earlier news, Backpack launched its first activity module "Daily Trading Competition". This gameplay is a daily refresh challenge task. There is no need to register. Users who participate in trading volume and profit activities can automatically participate in the prize pool distribution. The daily prize pool is 50,000-100,000 US dollars. Among them, the top 1,000 users in trading volume and the top 500 users in profit will receive 50% of the prize pool incentive, and the remaining users will be allocated another 50% of the prize pool in proportion to their trading volume and profit and loss.

data.title: Thailand bans five major crypto exchanges amid crackdown on unlicensed platforms
data.description:
30-5-2025 – Thailand’s financial watchdog has delivered a decisive blow to the cryptocurrency sector, moving to sever local access to five major digital asset trading platforms. The Securities and Exchange Commission announced that crypto exchanges Bybit, 1000X, CoinEx, OKX and XT will be banned locally starting June 28, marking a significant escalation in the country’s [. .

data.title: The crypto sector generally fell back, with the Layer2 sector leading the decline by nearly 9%, and BTC once fell below $105,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, the crypto sector generally pulled back, and the Layer2 sector fell 8.70% in 24 hours. Within the sector, Arbitrum (ARB), Optimism (OP), and Starknet (STRK) fell 11.31%, 11.43%, and 12.94% respectively. Bitcoin (BTC) fell 2.31%, once falling below the $105,000 mark. Ethereum (ETH) also ushered in a pullback, falling 4.21%, falling below $2,600.
In other sectors, CeFi sector fell 2.98%. Within the sector, Hyperliquid (HYPE) continued to fall, falling 4.85% again in 24 hours, while LEO Token (LEO) was relatively strong, rising 1.18%; PayFi sector fell 4.34%, but Safe (SAFE) rose 22.09% against the trend; Layer1 sector fell 4.83%, TRON (TRX) and Binance Coin (BNB) received support, falling 0.51% and 2.40% respectively; DeFi sector fell 7.24%, Uniswap (UNI), which had previously risen sharply, fell 10.78%, Meme sector fell 8.21%, Pepe (PEPE) and Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) fell 8.01% and 9.40% respectively, but SPX6900 (SPX) rose for two consecutive days, rising 4.46% during the session.
The crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market trends of the sector, shows that the ssiLayer2, ssiAI, and ssiDePIN indices fell by 9.05%, 8.59%, and 8.49% respectively in 24 hours.

data.title: 10K Ventures Completes First Phase of $10 Million Crypto Hybrid Strategy Investment Fund Fundraising
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, 10K Ventures announced that it has officially completed the first phase of the $10 million crypto hybrid strategy investment fund. 10K Ventures currently manages approximately $20 million in crypto assets. In the future, it will continue the "early support + primary and secondary linkage" strategy, focusing on AI Agent, stablecoin, Defi and other tracks.
10K Ventures adopts a "primary + secondary + quantitative" hybrid strategy, covering the entire life cycle of crypto assets, focusing on capturing early Alpha, and building a multi-level income strategy. As an investor focusing on the field of cryptocurrency, 10K Ventures firmly believes that blockchain technology is reshaping the underlying logic of global value exchange. 10K Ventures has always adhered to the value of long-termism. Through early investments that are people-oriented + in-depth research on the track, it has become a companion with industry innovators, jointly promoting decentralized technology empowerment, and witnessing the future of open finance and autonomous digital sovereignty.
It is reported that 10K Ventures was co-founded by Michael Jin, former head of OP Crypto Asia Pacific, and Zixi Zhu, former head of crypto at the US dollar fund. The team is located in Silicon Valley, Singapore and Hong Kong, with both traditional financial technology experience and crypto-native insights.

data.title: Bipartisan “CLARITY Act of 2025” Unveiled—Will It Finally End Crypto Regulatory Chaos Between the SEC and the CFTC?
data.description:
The proposed legislation would finally define which crypto assets fall under SEC or CFTC authority, offer registration pathways for platforms, and exempt qualified DeFi and wallet providers from burdensome securities regulation.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bipartisan-clarity-act-of-2025-unveiled-will-it-finally-end-crypto-regulatory-chaos-between-the-sec-and-the-cftc/

data.title: Head of the U.S. SEC Crypto Working Group: Crypto traders need to grow up, not cry to the government
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Hester Peirce, head of the U.S. SEC Crypto Working Group, said at the Bitcoin 2025 Conference that crypto investors should be responsible for their own investment decisions rather than seeking government assistance when they lose money. The committee member emphasized: "If you advocate free choice, you should learn lessons when your investment fails instead of asking for assistance." Peirce pointed out that most crypto tokens are not securities themselves, and related trading platforms do not need to register with the SEC unless they involve securities business. Regarding the recent popular Meme coin, she made it clear that this is a speculative field where investors need to bear their own risks. On the issue of listed companies holding crypto assets, Peirce is neutral and only emphasizes the need to disclose information. The SEC has recently passed a policy statement to exclude Meme coins, some mining activities and stablecoins from the scope of regulation. Peirce said that the SEC is clarifying the regulatory boundaries of digital asset securities, but the specific regulatory framework for retail crypto transactions still needs to be established by Congress. When the audience was asked whether federal crypto regulation was needed, they received a clear response of opposition. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Solana Ecosystem Token Issuance Platform Cooking.City Completes $7 Million Financing, Jump Crypto Leads Investment
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Solana Ecosystem Token Issuance Platform Cooking.City has completed a $7 million financing round, led by Jump Crypto, with participation from CMT Digital, Mirana, Bitscale Capital and EVG. Cooking.City is committed to reshaping the token issuance mechanism and proposing a new on-chain issuance model that is sustainable, incentive-rewarding, and community-centered.
The new model proposed by Cooking.City includes: value redistribution (redistributing most platform fees to developers and users), "confidence pool" mechanism (token issuers need to deposit a certain amount of funds in the smart contract in advance), and a social-based value distribution system (introducing a referral rebate system and redistributing fees within the ecosystem, with most fees used for community recommendations and transaction rewards, part returned to the token issuer, and the rest invested in the long-term development of the platform).

data.title: Can Cardano Price Rally Amid Whale Accumulation and eToro ADA Relisting?
data.description:
In seven days, Cardano (ADA) whales purchased over 180 million tokens, leading to Cardano price rally speculation. At the same time, investors will have more chances to join as eToro relists Cardano. These developments happen while the SEC continues to look into Grayscale’s application for the ADA ETF
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/29/can-cardano-price-rally-amid-whale-accumulation-and-etoro-ada-relisting/
